# feat(providers): add Ollama, update Z.AI to glm-4.7, add 3P model primers

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `4dcb0cd0a953` — feat(providers): add Ollama, update Z.AI to glm-4.7, add 3P model primers

**Body**:

- Add `ollama` provider: `csq setkey ollama` + `csq run N -p ollama` for
  local models (Ollama). No API key needed, points at localhost:11434.
- Update Z.AI provider from glm-4.6 to glm-4.7.
- Add keyless provider support: `csq setkey` no longer requires a key for
  local providers like Ollama.
- Add 3P model primers (prepend + append) that bookend the system prompt
  for non-Anthropic models with COC-critical instructions: tool usage,
  CLAUDE.md compliance, proactive agent/skill invocation, hook respect.
  Only applied to mm/zai/ollama profiles — Claude profiles untouched.
- Rewrite README: providers (Ollama/MiniMax/Z.AI) first with full setup
  instructions, multi-account rotation second. Context recommendation
  updated from 64k to 256k tokens.
- Add COC compliance benchmark (test-3p-model-bench.py): runs real CC
  instances via claude --print against coc-env, tests tool usage, rule
  following, agent awareness, and skill awareness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
